title: COPY --exclude not supported
body:
### Issue Description

When having `COPY --exclude="folder" --exclude="weights/**" . /src`, build fails:

```
STEP x/y: COPY --exclude="folder_name" . /src
Error: building at STEP "COPY --exclude=folder_name . /src": COPY --excludes is not supported
```

Although it's supported by docker: https://docs.docker.com/reference/dockerfile/#copy---exclude

I'm using `# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.10.0` in the top of the Dockerfile.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Have following DockerFile:

```
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.10.0
FROM alpine:latest

WORKDIR /src

COPY --exclude="weights" . /src

CMD ["/bin/sh"]
```
2. run `podman build -t project-name.`
3. it errors out


### Describe the results you received

```
STEP x/y: COPY --exclude="folder_name" . /src
Error: building at STEP "COPY --exclude=folder_name . /src": COPY --excludes is not supported
```


### Describe the results you expected

I expected it to build things neatly without error and excluding the folder in question.
